identity.name: KrishiRakshak X
identity.mission: Empower farmers with AI-driven insights for soil, crops, and markets.

primary.description: Emerald Green - Represents growth, crops, and nature.

secondary.description: Amber/Earth - Represents soil, harvest, and warmth.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium

cards.dashboard: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-emerald-100 p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300
cards.feature: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-sm rounded-2xl p-8 border border-emerald-50 hover:border-emerald-200 transition-all duration-300 group

inputs.default: rounded-lg border-emerald-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 focus:border-transparent bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Manrope' for all headings to give a modern, friendly feel.
Use 'Inter' for body text for maximum readability on mobile devices.
Implement a 'Light Mode' first approach. The app should feel airy, clean, and organic.
Use the Emerald Green (#059669) as the primary action color. It builds trust and relates to nature.
For the Dashboard, use the 'Bento Grid' layout (Mode A) but adapted for mobile (stacking cards).
Use Recharts for all data visualization (Soil moisture, Price trends). Style them with the primary and secondary colors.
Ensure all touch targets (buttons, inputs) are at least 44px high for easy tapping on mobile.
Use the provided image URLs for specific sections (Hero, Disease Detection, Equipment Rental).
For the 'Disease Detection' page, create a camera-like interface frame.
For 'Mandi Pricing', use clear, large text for prices and trends.
Do not use gradients for text. Keep text high-contrast against the background.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add `.App { text-align: center; }` in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use `sonner` for toasts. Sonner component are located in `/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx`
